description: P3 champion (S3/E5_Data_Augmentation/barlow) evaluated on ONLY the 9 first-syllable ground-truth classes, for apples-to-apples Tier 2 comparison with P6's first_syllable_e2e. Model itself is unchanged (still predicts over all 19 classes); only the evaluation subset (ground truth) is restricted.

error_breakdown.note: The flat 19-class model has no structural constraint limiting it to the 9 first-syllable classes (unlike P6's coarse stage, which structurally has only 4 possible outputs). A meaningful fraction of P3's errors on this subset can therefore be 'impossible' guesses toward a second-syllable class -- this is expected behaviour, not a bug, and is itself an architectural point of comparison against P6.
